title: Additional four species of Tatraea in Yunnan Province, China
author: Li, Cui-Jin-Yi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 8 Tatraea yuxiensis (HKAS 128268, holotype) a fresh ascomata on the wood b–e dried ascomata on the wood f vertical section of an ascoma g–i excipulum j–k paraphyses l–o asci (o–p asci in Meltzer's reagent) p–v ascospores. Scale bars: 1.5 mm (b); 700 μm (d–c); 400 μm (e); 800 μm (f–g); 1000 μm (h); 200 μm (i); 100 μm (j); 70 μm (k–p); 15 μm (q–v).
